title: MENTORING PROGRAM - 211info
text: THE HEALING CIRCLE INC MENTORING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a year-round mentoring program, activities may include roller skating, craft activities, scavenger hunts, general hangouts, and youth-directed activities. 1054 Exchange Street Suite A Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Children who are survivors of sexual abuse, a court case is not required. Most activities are for children ages 5-20. Children outside the age range can be accommodated on a case-by-case basis. Hours: Varies Email (503) 468-2844 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 325-2761 Main phone Message Phone (503) 468-2844 Call and Text messages accepted Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clatop, Columbia, Multmomah, and Tillamook Counties SITE HOURS: No standard hours Services: Mentoring Programs * Child Abuse Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - VICTORY OVER CHILD ABUSE CAMPS VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOCA CAMPS VOLUNTEER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE HEALING CIRCLE INC
